progress_update.memory_recovered: The canonical queue is a historical snapshot and can lag additive queue updates and later commits; current-state interpretation must reconcile all three layers rather than overwrite earlier observations.

claim_states.observed: Canonical C-001 progress is older than a later owned queue update and integration commit.
claim_states.inferred: Canonical-only readers may understate current progress.
claim_states.superseded: None; older snapshots remain valid historical observations.
claim_states.unresolved: No accepted reconciliation rule exists, and Cloudflare deployment remains unproven.

progress_update.verification: The artifact names exact public repository paths, blob SHAs, and commit SHAs with a falsification route.

remaining: Add CM-0010 to the canonical continuity index through an owned append-only update.
